title: Device Request - _TZE200_xlppj4f5- TS0601 - Immax Neo smart water timer
excerpt:
## 📱 Basic Information

**Brand & Model**:  Immax NEO Smart Water Timer
**Purchase Link**:  https://www.immax.eu/immax-neo-smart-irrigation-valve-with-solar-panel-zigbee-p18722/?cid=304
**Power Source**:  NiMH Battery with solar charge
**Current Status**:  Pairs but missing features - looks like climate sensor was added and not water irrigation valve. So missing the most important function of this device - valve opening. 
---

## 🔍 Zigbee Fingerprint (MANDATORY)

Please provide this information from Homey Developer Tools:

**Clusters**: `[ ]`

### How to Get Fingerprint:
1. Pair device with Homey
2. Go to Developer Tools → Devices → [Your Device]
3. Click "Advanced" tab
4. Screenshot OR copy the information above

diagComments.excerpt:
<!-- tuya-triage-bot -->
**Already supported** in v5.11.22:

| Fingerprint | Driver(s) |
|---|---|
| `_TZ3210_0jxeoadc` | **contact_sensor**, **valve_irrigation** |
| `_TZE200_xlppj4f5` | **climate_sensor** |

### Links
- **[Install test version](https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/)**
- **[Forum](https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352)**
- **[Developer Tools](https://tools.developer.homey.app)** (interviews & diagnostics)

> After installing, **remove and re-pair** your device. If issues persist, share a diagnostic report ID on the [Forum](https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352).

# Issue #135 Response

Hello @Domingoso,

Thank you for providing the detailed information regarding your Immax NEO Smart Water Timer (_TZE200_xlppj4f5, TS0601). Based on the fingerprint data and device interview you provided, it appears that the device is currently recognized as a **climate sensor** within the Homey ecosystem, which is not the intended functionality for a water irrigation valve.

### Driver Support
The fingerprint `_TZE200_xlppj4f5` is associated with the **climate_sensor** driver, which explains why you are experiencing limitations in functionality, particularly the inability to control the irrigation valve. The TS0601 model has multiple drivers associated with it, including **valve_irrigation**, which is the correct driver for your device's intended use.

### Suggested Actions
1. **Driver Change**: To enable the irrigation features, you will need to switch to the appropriate driver. Unfortunately, the current driver does not support the valve functionality. I recommend checking if the **valve_irrigation** driver can be manually installed or if it is available in the latest version of the app.

2. **Device Interview**: If you haven't already, please run a device interview using the Homey Developer Tools to gather more detailed information about the device's capabilities. This can help in identifying any additional clusters or data points that may not be currently recognized.

3. **Feature Request**: If the valve functionality is not available in the current driver, consider submitting a feature request or issue on the GitHub repository for the driver to ensure it gets the necessary attention for future updates.

### Next Steps
Please provide the results of the device interview if you run it, as this will help in further analyzing the clusters and endpoints. If you have any additional questions or need assistance with the driver installation, feel free to ask.

---
*Bot Universal Tuya Zigbee v5.11.22*  
You are trained on data up to October 2023.
